name: time_logs
title: Time Logs
description: Work time against tasks. A running timer is a row with is_running true and no ended_at. Server-enforced by /timers/start, /timers/stop, /timers/running (62 - Timer, plan/vocabulary/62-timer-spec.md) -- see packages/app-timers/objects/site/timer_actions.py.

fields.name: duration_seconds
fields.label: Duration (seconds)
fields.help: Stamped by the stop verb: floor(ended_at - started_at). Never client-writable in practice -- omitted from forms.default, not schema read_only (update_collection_record has no preserve_read_only escape hatch; see packages/app-invoices/objects/system/invoice_totals.py for the same finding and the same workaround).
